expectations.text: Output file is a duplicate, original untouched
expectations.evidence: Output is '12-health-wellness-animated.html' (with -animated suffix) in with_skill/outputs/. Original '12-health-wellness.html' exists separately in without_skill/outputs/ and is not modified.

expectations.text: GSAP and ScrollTrigger CDN scripts are included
Motion personality is 'subtle' — durations should bias toward base/slow (0.6-1.0s)
expectations.evidence: Core animation durations: 0.7, 1.0, 0.7, 0.6, 0.6, 1.0 (hero), 0.65, 0.75, 0.6 (section reveals), 0.65 (card stagger), 0.8 (footer) — all in 0.6-1.0s range. Only navbar (0.3-0.4) and hover (0.4-0.5) are below, which is appropriate for those interaction types.

expectations.text: Easing uses entrance (power2.out) or transition (power2.inOut), NOT spring or elastic
expectations.evidence: All easings found: power2.out (entrance), power2.inOut (transition on hero image), power2.in (nav exit), none (parallax scrub). Zero instances of elastic, back.out, or spring easings. Comments at lines 416 and 424 explicitly note 'no spring/elastic'.

expectations.text: Hero section has parallax effect (yPercent with scrub:true) on desktop only
expectations.evidence: Lines 309-322: Pattern 5 applies gsap.to('.hero-image', { yPercent: -12 }) with scrollTrigger { scrub: 1.5 }, guarded by `if (!isTouch)` check (line 310-311) to restrict to desktop/non-touch devices only.

expectations.text: Ritual cards have staggered scroll reveal
expectations.evidence: Lines 391-413: All '.reveal-card' elements (which includes ritual cards at lines 92, 101, 110) get fromTo animation with autoAlpha:0→1, y:36→0, duration 0.65, and stagger via `delay: siblingIndex * 0.13` with individual ScrollTrigger per card.

expectations.text: Product cards have staggered scroll reveal
expectations.evidence: Lines 391-413: Same '.reveal-card' selector covers product cards (lines 131, 137, 143, 149). Each card gets staggered delay based on siblingIndex within its parent grid, with ScrollTrigger start at 'top 88%'.

Journal cards at lines 180, 188, 196 all have '.reveal-card' class and are animated by the card stagger reveal (lines 391-413). Journal section heading and label are animated by '.section-heading' (lines 358-372) and '.section-label' (lines 342-356) scroll reveals.

Line 264: `const mm = gsap.matchMedia()`. Lines 269-472: all animations wrapped in `mm.add('(prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)', () => { ... })`. Lines 477-484: reduced-motion fallback in `mm.add('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)', ...)`.

expectations.text: Reduced-motion fallback uses clearProps or sets elements to visible state
expectations.evidence: Lines 477-484: mm.add('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)') calls gsap.set() with { clearProps: 'all' } on all animated elements: hero-badge, hero-heading, hero-body, hero-ctas, hero-stats, hero-image, section-label, section-heading, section-body, reveal-card, footer. CSS @keyframes breathe also has @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) fallback at line 256-258.

expectations.text: autoAlpha used instead of bare opacity
expectations.evidence: All GSAP fromTo calls use autoAlpha (13 instances found across hero timeline, section reveals, card stagger, and footer reveal). The word 'opacity' only appears in CSS @keyframes (lines 250-251) and CSS reduced-motion fallback (line 257), never in any GSAP animation call.

expectations.text: No layout-triggering properties animated (no width, height, top, left, margin)
expectations.evidence: Animated GSAP properties are exclusively: y, yPercent, autoAlpha, scale. No width, height, top, left, or margin properties appear in any gsap.to/fromTo/set call. The grep matches for those words are only in CSS class names, meta viewport tag, and ScrollTrigger start/end strings.

expectations.text: Token comments present in animation values
expectations.evidence: 27 token comments found throughout the script. Examples: '// token: entrance (subtle personality)' (line 274), '// token: ~base' (line 280), '// token: slow' (line 284), '// token: base' (line 294), '// token: slow / transition' (line 304), '// token: scrub' (line 314), '// token: loose stagger (breathing pace)' (line 405), '// token: entrance (calm, no spring)' (line 424).
